keyFindings: MiMo-Code Judge Model = Independent evaluator preventing optimistic stops - distinct from Anthropic GAN evaluator agent (judge is separate model instance, not another agent)
MiMo-Code checkpoint + context reconstruction = cross-session state preservation, prerequisite for reliable judge evaluation
learn-harness-engineering = most comprehensive harness engineering course (12 lectures, 6 projects, 14 languages, MIT)
learn-harness-engineering Lecture 5 = Evaluator Loop = direct theoretical background for MiMo-Code judge model article
XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-Code already had R360 article (context-memory cluster), new judge model + checkpoint features belong in harness/evaluation cluster
GitHub API search (stars:>=3000 + pushed:>2026-06-01) effective for discovering fresh high-value projects
